_comment_scope: Project-scoped MCP servers for the Expo mobile app. Launch Claude Code from mobile/ so these are discovered. Both servers require per-user approval on first activation (Claude Code will prompt).

expo._comment: Expo docs + EAS access, version-matched to the installed Expo SDK. After Claude Code starts, run /mcp inside the session to authenticate against Expo (personal access token from expo.dev — NOT a work-org token; see root CLAUDE.md §1 separation rule).

ios-simulator._comment: Local iOS Simulator control for visual verification (screenshot / record_video). Pinned to ^1.6.0; MUST stay >= 1.3.3 per the pre-1.3.3 command-injection CVE noted in infra/CLAUDE.md. Interactive UI-manipulation tools (tap/type/swipe/find/install/launch) are filtered out; only observation + boot/list simulators remain.
